turns.content: For the REST transport prod config, set STRATA_TOKEN_SECRET (HMAC signing key, 32 hex bytes from openssl rand -hex 32), STRATA_AUTH_PROXY_TOKEN (shared secret with the upstream proxy), and STRATA_REQUIRE_AUTH_PROXY=1 so the transport refuses unverified requests.
Got it. Want me to add those three to the deployment runbook with the openssl example and a note that STRATA_TOKEN_SECRET_PREVIOUS exists for grace-window rotation?

query: Which env var sets the REST signing key?
